name: Perqsy
description: Employee perks & rewards marketplace. B2B SaaS letting HR teams curate benefit catalogs employees can redeem with points.
currentGoal: Ship the points-redemption checkout flow end to end.
currentTask: Wiring Stripe payment-intent confirmation into the redemption store.
nextTask: Add idempotency keys + retry handling to the redemption service.
blockers: Awaiting finance sign-off on the point-to-USD conversion table before enabling live payouts.
recentDecisions: Adopted Stripe PaymentIntents over Charges API for SCA compliance.
Points ledger is append-only; balances are derived, never mutated in place.
Chose TanStack Query for server cache to kill duplicate catalog fetches.

recentCommits.message: feat: confirm payment intent on redeem

nextSessionPrompt: Resume on feat/redemption-checkout. Finish PaymentIntent confirmation in redemption.ts, then add idempotency keys to the redeem endpoint. Do NOT enable live payouts until finance approves the conversion table.
